metadata.description: Sample customer support tickets for EstateFlow CRM — used to train and test the AI Customer Success FTE

tickets.subject: How do I import my contacts from Zillow?
tickets.message: Hi, I just signed up for EstateFlow and I'm trying to get my Zillow leads in. I connected my Zillow account in settings but I don't see any contacts showing up yet. It's been about an hour. Is there something else I need to do? Thanks, Sarah
tickets.expected_resolution: Explain that Zillow leads can take up to 15 minutes to sync, verify the integration is active, and walk through Settings → Integrations → Zillow to check connection status.

tickets.message: hey how do i reset my password i cant get in
tickets.expected_resolution: Direct to the Forgot Password link on the login page. Mention to check spam if the reset email doesn't arrive.

tickets.subject: How do I set up lead routing for my team?
tickets.message: We have 6 agents and I want Zillow leads to go to 3 of them and Realtor.com leads to go to the other 3. Can I set that up in EstateFlow? Where do I find lead routing?
tickets.expected_resolution: Explain lead routing by source: Settings → Lead Routing → + New Rule → select Source as condition, then assign agents. Walk through creating two rules.

tickets.subject: Need help setting up SSO with Okta
tickets.message: Hello, we are trying to configure Single Sign-On using Okta for our 42 agents. Our IT team has set up the SAML app on Okta's side but we're stuck on the EstateFlow configuration. Where do we enter the metadata URL and what ACS URL should we give Okta? Looking forward to your guidance.
tickets.expected_resolution: Escalate to human support — SSO/SAML setup for enterprise accounts requires hands-on assistance. Provide the general path (Brokerage Admin → Security → SSO) and let human team handle the specifics.
tickets.escalation_reason: Enterprise brokerage plan SSO configuration — requires technical hands-on support

tickets.message: can i send texts to clients from estateflow
tickets.expected_resolution: SMS is available on Professional plan and above. Briefly explain the feature and mention the upgrade path.

tickets.subject: What happens when my free trial ends?
tickets.message: My trial is ending in 3 days and I want to know what happens. Will my contacts be deleted? Do I need to enter my card now? I don't want to lose the data I already set up.
tickets.expected_resolution: Reassure: data is retained for 30 days after trial expiration. They need to add a payment method to continue uninterrupted. Explain how to do so via Settings → Billing.

tickets.subject: Automation not triggering — please help
tickets.message: Hi team, I set up an automation to send a welcome email when a new lead is added, but it's not firing. I've added 3 new contacts today and none of them received the email. The automation is turned on. I checked the run history and it just says 'No runs yet'. What am I doing wrong?
tickets.expected_resolution: Check trigger conditions match exactly (e.g., lifecycle stage must be 'Lead'). Ask if contacts were added with the correct stage. Direct to Settings → Automations → Run History for errors. Walk through common setup mistakes.

tickets.message: app keeps crashing on iPhone when i open a contact
tickets.expected_resolution: Ask for iOS version and app version. Advise: force-close and reopen, log out and back in, reinstall. If persists, escalate as a bug.

tickets.subject: How do I export all my data?
tickets.message: We're doing a quarterly audit and need to export all contact records, deal history, and activity logs. Is there a way to do a full export from EstateFlow? What format does it come in?
tickets.expected_resolution: Direct to Settings → Account → Export My Data. Explain: export arrives as CSV/ZIP via email within 24 hours. Includes contacts, deals, tasks, emails, notes.

tickets.subject: I want to cancel my subscription
tickets.message: Hi, I'd like to cancel my EstateFlow subscription. I've been using it for 3 months but I'm just not finding it useful for my workflow. Can you process a cancellation for me? Also, do I get a refund for the remaining days this month?
tickets.expected_resolution: Acknowledge frustration empathetically. Explain cancellation process (Settings → Billing → Cancel Plan). Clarify no refund for partial months per policy. Offer to help resolve the workflow issue before cancelling — ask what isn't working. Flag for retention follow-up.
tickets.escalation_reason: Cancellation intent — retention opportunity, needs human follow-up

tickets.message: whats the difference between starter and professional
tickets.expected_resolution: Briefly list key differences: Starter = 500 contacts, 1 pipeline, no automations or SMS. Professional = unlimited contacts, unlimited pipelines, automations, drip campaigns, SMS. Mention price.

tickets.subject: Agent is seeing other agents' contacts
tickets.message: One of our agents reported that she can see contacts assigned to other agents. She should only see her own. We're on the Brokerage plan. Is there a setting I'm missing? This is a privacy concern for us.
tickets.expected_resolution: Check the agent's role — if set to Team Lead or Admin, they have broader visibility by design. To restrict: Settings → Team → [Agent Name] → Edit Role → set to 'Agent'. Explain role-based access clearly.

tickets.subject: Can I create custom pipeline stages?
tickets.message: Hey, I want to set up my pipeline with stages that match my exact process. The default stages don't fit my workflow. Can I rename them or add new ones? If so, how?
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — fully supported. Go to Pipelines → [Pipeline Name] → Edit Pipeline → Add Stage or rename existing stages by clicking on the stage name.

tickets.message: how do i merge two duplicate contacts
tickets.expected_resolution: Go to Contacts, find the duplicate notification or locate both records manually, open one → More Options → Merge Contact → select the record to merge with → confirm. Warn that merge is irreversible.

tickets.subject: Invoice shows wrong number of agents
tickets.message: My latest invoice shows 8 agents but we only have 6 active. Two of those accounts were deactivated last month. I'm being overbilled. Can you fix this and issue a credit?
tickets.expected_resolution: Escalate — billing disputes and credit requests must be handled by human billing team. Acknowledge the issue, confirm you've escalated it, and give expected response time (1 business day).
tickets.escalation_reason: Billing dispute — overbilling claim requiring credit review by billing team

tickets.subject: How do I set up email templates?
tickets.message: Hi! I want to create a template for my new lead introduction email so I don't have to retype it each time. How do I do this? Also can I use the client's name automatically in the email?
tickets.expected_resolution: Walk through Settings → Email Templates → + New Template. Explain merge tags: {{first_name}}, {{agent_name}}, etc. Explain how to use a template when composing an email from a contact record.

tickets.message: how do i see all my agents activity in one place
tickets.expected_resolution: Direct to the Team Dashboard (visible to Team Leads): Reports → Agent Activity. Shows tasks completed, emails sent, calls logged per agent. Also accessible from the main dashboard for team leads.

tickets.subject: DocuSign documents not syncing back
tickets.message: I connected DocuSign and sent a contract for signature from within EstateFlow. The client signed it but the status in EstateFlow still shows 'Pending Signature'. It's been 2 days. This is making my transaction tracking inaccurate.
tickets.expected_resolution: Ask: is the DocuSign integration still showing as Connected (Settings → Integrations → DocuSign)? Try disconnecting and reconnecting. If the sync still fails after reconnect, escalate as a potential integration bug with the deal ID and DocuSign envelope ID.

tickets.subject: Can I have two pipelines — one for buyers and one for sellers?
tickets.message: I handle both buyer and seller clients and the default pipeline doesn't work for both. Can I create separate pipelines with different stages for each? Is that possible on my current plan?
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — Professional plan supports unlimited pipelines. Walk through Pipelines → + New Pipeline. Explain they can have different stages per pipeline and assign contacts/deals to either.

tickets.message: is there a free plan
tickets.expected_resolution: No permanent free plan. All plans have a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. Starter plan is $39/mo — most affordable option. Mention annual billing saves 20%.

tickets.subject: iOS app crashing — still happening after reinstall
tickets.message: I submitted a WhatsApp message earlier about the app crashing. I've reinstalled it twice and it still crashes every time I try to open a contact record. I'm on iPhone 14, iOS 17.4, app version 3.2.1. This is a serious issue — I can't access my client info.
tickets.expected_resolution: Escalate as a confirmed bug. Collect: device model (iPhone 14), iOS version (17.4), app version (3.2.1), steps to reproduce. Acknowledge urgency, escalate to engineering, give 24-hour response commitment.
tickets.escalation_reason: Confirmed app crash bug — persists after reinstall, needs engineering investigation

tickets.subject: How do I invite a new agent to my team?
tickets.message: We just hired a new agent and I want to add her to our EstateFlow account. Can you walk me through how to invite her? Do I get charged immediately when I add her?
tickets.expected_resolution: Settings → Team → Invite Agent → enter email and role. Billing: a prorated charge for the new seat is added immediately and the full seat charge starts at the next billing cycle.

tickets.message: do you guys have a zapier integration
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — search EstateFlow in Zapier's app directory. Supported triggers: New Contact, Stage Changed, Deal Closed. Actions: Create Contact, Create Task, Move Deal.

tickets.subject: How do I track a deal from offer to closing?
tickets.message: A client just had their offer accepted! I want to track everything from here to closing — inspection, appraisal, loan commitment, final walkthrough. What's the best way to do this in EstateFlow?
tickets.expected_resolution: Introduce the Transaction Coordination module. When a deal moves to 'Under Contract' in the pipeline, create a transaction and select a buyer-side template. Explain the checklist with auto-populated key dates and deadline alerts.

tickets.subject: I hit my 500 contact limit — what now?
tickets.message: I just got a warning that I've reached my 500 contact limit on the Starter plan. I can't add new leads now. What are my options? I don't want to lose any new leads coming in.
tickets.expected_resolution: Upgrade to Professional ($79/mo) for unlimited contacts. Explain upgrade process: Settings → Billing → Change Plan. Upgrade is instant. Alternatively, archive inactive contacts to free up space (but upgrading is the better long-term solution). Flag as upsell opportunity.

tickets.message: how do i pause an automation without deleting it
tickets.expected_resolution: Settings → Automations → find the automation → toggle the Active switch to off. It pauses without deleting. Can be re-enabled at any time.

tickets.subject: Need full audit log for compliance review
tickets.message: Our brokerage is undergoing a state compliance audit. We need a full audit log of all user actions from January 1, 2025 to March 1, 2026. How do I access this?
tickets.expected_resolution: Brokerage Admin → Audit Logs. Covers past 12 months of all user actions. Can filter by date range and user. Export as CSV. If data beyond 12 months is needed, escalate to support for special data retrieval.

tickets.subject: Outlook sync is broken — emails not logging
tickets.message: My Outlook integration stopped working about 3 days ago. Emails I send to clients from Outlook are no longer showing up in their activity timeline in EstateFlow. I tried reconnecting but it asks me to sign in to Microsoft and then just goes back to the same error screen.
tickets.expected_resolution: Confirm the integration is showing an error in Settings → Integrations → Outlook. Try: clear browser cache, use a private/incognito window to reconnect, grant all Microsoft permissions. If the loop persists, escalate with the error message text and browser details.

tickets.message: can i download invoices for last year for tax purposes
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — Settings → Billing → Invoice History. All past invoices are listed and can be downloaded as PDFs individually or in bulk.

tickets.subject: Can I assign a deal to two agents?
tickets.message: We have co-listings where two agents share a deal. Is there a way to assign a deal to more than one agent so both of them can see and edit it?
tickets.expected_resolution: On Team plan, deals can be shared between agents. On Professional individual plan this is limited. Explain the Team plan feature. If they're on Professional, suggest upgrading to Team or using shared contact assignment as a workaround. Flag as potential upsell.

tickets.subject: I accidentally deleted a contact — can I recover it?
tickets.message: I deleted a contact by mistake and I need it back. It had all the notes and call history from 6 months of working with this client. Is there a recycle bin or a way to restore deleted contacts?
tickets.expected_resolution: Escalate — data recovery from deletion must be handled by the support/engineering team. Check if a backup restoration within the 30-day window is possible. Be empathetic, confirm escalation immediately, give realistic timeline expectation.
tickets.escalation_reason: Accidental data deletion — requires backend data recovery investigation

tickets.message: does estateflow work on android
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — available on Google Play. Search 'EstateFlow CRM'. Requires Android 10 or higher.

tickets.subject: How do I connect Google Calendar?
tickets.message: I want my EstateFlow tasks to show up in my Google Calendar. Is this possible? I looked in settings but couldn't find it easily.
tickets.expected_resolution: Settings → Integrations → Google Calendar → Connect. After connecting, tasks with due dates sync as Google Calendar events. Meeting events from Google Calendar also appear in the EstateFlow activity feed.

tickets.subject: My agents aren't logging their calls — how do I enforce it?
tickets.message: I manage a team of 8 agents and they never remember to log calls manually. Is there a way to require call logging or set up automatic reminders? The activity data is useless without it.
tickets.expected_resolution: Explain manual call logging from contact records. Mention that automatic call logging via direct phone integration is not currently available but is on the roadmap. Suggest setting up a daily automation task reminder for agents: 'Log today's calls'. Also point to Agent Activity report to monitor compliance.

tickets.message: upgraded to pro but automations still not showing
tickets.expected_resolution: Ask: did they log out and back in after upgrading? Plan features refresh on session restart. If still not showing after re-login, check the billing page to confirm upgrade processed. If confirmed and still not working, escalate.

tickets.subject: How do I set up a drip campaign for cold leads?
tickets.message: I have about 200 leads I collected at open houses over the past year that have gone cold. I want to set up a 6-email nurture sequence over 3 months to warm them back up. Can EstateFlow do this? How do I set it up?
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — available on Professional. Walk through: tag the 200 contacts with a label like 'cold-2025', then go to Automations → Drip Campaigns → + New Campaign, set audience to that tag, add 6 emails with 14-day intervals. Campaigns pause automatically if the contact replies.

tickets.subject: Agent left the company — how do I reassign their contacts?
tickets.message: One of our agents resigned yesterday. She had 47 active contacts and 3 live transactions. How do I deactivate her account and make sure her clients and deals are reassigned to other agents properly?
tickets.expected_resolution: Settings → Team → Manage Agents → [Agent Name] → Deactivate. During deactivation, you'll be prompted to reassign all their contacts and deals to another agent. Transactions carry over with full history intact. Confirm the departed agent loses access immediately upon deactivation.

tickets.message: whats the pipeline health score thing? i see colored dots
tickets.expected_resolution: Explain: green = on track, yellow = needs attention (no activity 7+ days), red = at risk (14+ days, overdue tasks). Hover to see reason, click for suggested next actions.

tickets.subject: Can clients see documents I upload to their deal?
tickets.message: I want my buyers to be able to see the inspection report and disclosure documents without me having to email them separately. Is there a way to share documents with clients directly through EstateFlow?
tickets.expected_resolution: Introduce the Client Portal (available on Team and Brokerage plans). On Professional plan, document sharing through a portal isn't available — suggest upgrading to Team or manually sending documents via the Communication Hub. Flag as upsell opportunity.

tickets.subject: I need a refund — charged twice this month
tickets.message: I was charged twice in March — one on March 1 and another on March 8. I only have one subscription. This appears to be a billing error. I need a refund for the duplicate charge immediately.
tickets.expected_resolution: Escalate immediately — duplicate charge requires billing team review and refund processing. Acknowledge the issue sincerely, confirm escalation, provide expected resolution time (1 business day). Do not promise a specific refund amount.
tickets.escalation_reason: Duplicate billing charge — requires immediate billing team investigation and refund

tickets.message: how do i make a compliance checklist that all agents must complete before closing
tickets.expected_resolution: Brokerage Admin → Compliance → + New Checklist. Add required items — agents cannot mark a transaction as Closed without completing them. Admins can audit completion status from the admin dashboard.

tickets.subject: How do I re-run the onboarding wizard?
tickets.message: I rushed through the onboarding when I first signed up and missed a few steps. Is there a way to go through it again? I want to properly connect my email and import my contacts this time.
tickets.expected_resolution: Settings → Onboarding → Re-run Wizard. It walks through the same steps: connect email, import contacts, create first pipeline. Nothing resets — it just guides them through setup again.

tickets.subject: Bulk email to all my contacts — is it possible?
tickets.message: I want to send a market update email to all 340 of my contacts at once. Can EstateFlow do this or do I have to use a separate email service?
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — use Bulk Actions. Go to Contacts → select all (or filter a subset) → Bulk Actions → Send Email → choose or write a template → Send. For high volume, the drip campaign or a batch send approach is recommended to avoid spam filters.

tickets.message: can i use estateflow without connecting my email
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — email connection is optional. Core features (contacts, pipeline, tasks) work without it. You won't get email logging or the ability to send emails from within EstateFlow, but everything else is functional.

tickets.subject: How do I generate a monthly performance report?
tickets.message: My broker wants a report showing how many deals each agent closed, total volume, and average days to close for Q1 2026. Can EstateFlow produce this?
tickets.expected_resolution: Reports → Closed Deals: filter by Q1 2026, group by agent. Reports → Days to Close: same date range. Export both as CSV or PDF. For Team Leads, Agent Activity report also shows per-agent deal count. Walk through each report.

tickets.subject: This software is terrible — nothing works
tickets.message: I've been a customer for 2 months and this software has been a disaster. My email doesn't sync, my automations don't trigger, and your mobile app crashes constantly. I'm paying $79 a month for something that doesn't work. I want to talk to someone NOW. This is completely unacceptable.
tickets.expected_resolution: Escalate immediately — multiple unresolved issues + very angry customer = high churn risk. Acknowledge all issues, sincerely apologize, confirm immediate escalation to a human agent for a callback. Do not attempt to troubleshoot multiple issues in one message.
tickets.escalation_reason: Highly frustrated customer with multiple unresolved issues — urgent churn risk, requires human contact

tickets.message: is there a way to see which leads came from open houses vs zillow
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — filter Contacts by Lead Source field. Each contact has a Lead Source tag (Zillow, Realtor.com, Open House, Referral, etc.) assigned at import or manually. Use Contacts → Filter → Lead Source to see breakdown. Lead Conversion report also breaks down by source.

tickets.subject: Setting up 2FA for my account
tickets.message: My brokerage is requiring all agents to enable two-factor authentication on their CRM accounts. How do I set this up in EstateFlow? I use Google Authenticator already.
tickets.expected_resolution: Settings → Security → Two-Factor Authentication → Enable. Select 'Authenticator App' → scan the QR code with Google Authenticator → enter the 6-digit code to verify. 2FA is active from the next login.

tickets.subject: Can I try the Professional features before upgrading?
tickets.message: I'm on Starter and curious about automations. Is there a way to test the Professional features without committing to an upgrade? Maybe a trial for the upgrade?
tickets.expected_resolution: Explain: during the initial 14-day free trial, all Professional features are available. Post-trial, there's no separate upgrade trial. However, they can upgrade and cancel within 30 days if not satisfied — point to the cancellation policy. Flag as potential upsell.

tickets.message: actually wait before i cancel can you tell me how to make the pipeline easier to use
tickets.expected_resolution: Re-engage warmly. Ask what specifically feels hard about the pipeline. Offer a quick walk-through of key pipeline features: drag-and-drop stages, deal cards, health score, task linking. Suggest the onboarding wizard re-run. Flag as retention opportunity.

tickets.subject: Can we get custom branding on the client portal?
tickets.message: We want the client portal to show our brokerage logo and brand colors instead of the EstateFlow branding. Our clients should feel like it's our product, not a third-party tool. Is this available?
tickets.expected_resolution: Yes — custom branding (logo and colors) on the client portal is available on Brokerage plans. Go to Brokerage Admin → Branding → upload logo and set brand color hex. Full white-labeling is available as an enterprise add-on — suggest contacting sales for pricing.

tickets.subject: Migrating from Follow Up Boss — need help with data import
tickets.message: Hi, we're switching from Follow Up Boss to EstateFlow. We have about 1,200 contacts and 3 years of activity history. Follow Up Boss lets us export a full CSV. What's the best way to migrate our data? Will activity history come across too?
tickets.expected_resolution: Contacts import via CSV works smoothly. Activity history (calls, notes, emails) depends on the CSV columns — custom field mapping can handle most fields. Activity history from external systems isn't auto-imported but notes can be included as a 'Notes' column. For 1,200+ contacts, recommend contacting support for a guided migration session. Flag for human follow-up.
tickets.escalation_reason: Large-scale migration (1,200+ contacts) — benefits from guided human support to ensure data quality

tickets.message: how long does the data export take
tickets.expected_resolution: Data export is emailed within 24 hours of the request. Most accounts receive it within a few hours. Large accounts (thousands of records) may take up to 24 hours.

tickets.subject: I think my account was accessed by someone else
tickets.message: I just got a login notification from a location I don't recognize — Chicago, IL — and I'm based in Denver, CO. I haven't given anyone my credentials. Did someone access my account without permission? What should I do?
tickets.expected_resolution: Treat as a security incident — escalate immediately. Instruct: change password immediately, enable 2FA if not already on, log out of all sessions (Settings → Security → Sign Out All Devices). Escalate to security team to review access logs.
tickets.escalation_reason: Potential unauthorized account access — security incident requiring immediate investigation

tickets.subject: Following up — billing issue still not resolved
tickets.message: I submitted a support request through the web form 3 days ago about being overcharged for 8 agents when we only have 6. I haven't heard back from anyone. This is very disappointing for a paid customer. Can someone please look into this?
tickets.expected_resolution: Escalate with urgency flag — customer has not received a response to a prior escalation. Apologize for the delay, confirm the original ticket is being surfaced to billing with priority, provide a direct commitment for follow-up within 24 hours.
tickets.escalation_reason: Unresolved billing dispute follow-up — customer waiting 3 days with no response, requires urgent priority
